  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

DAEJ77_C lot_V2.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 742
Recv ID: 762
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 04
Func Name: Direction assistée

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "DZ9",
    "soft": "8330",
    "version": "0007"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "AKR",
    "soft": "8330",
    "version": "0007"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 22017,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Voltage": "0"
    },
    "name": "Battery voltage"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53248,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "BUS OFF parameter": "0",
      "Mute Module parameter": "0",
      "MUX messaging reference": "0",
      "Producer ECM Absent parameter": "0",
      "Engine status": "0"
    },
    "name": "CAN bus fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22032,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN Engine Status fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22033,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Reverse Gear Status": "0",
      "Producer UCH absent parameter": "1"
    },
    "name": "CAN RearGearEngaged Invalid"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22025,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Vehicle Speed": "0",
      "Producer ABS/ESP absent parameter": "1"
    },
    "name": "CAN vehicle speed Fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22021,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {
      "Angle": "0",
      "Calibration status": "0",
      "Velocity Steering": "0"
    },
    "name": "EPS fault - Angle sensor"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22024,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "EPS fault - ECU"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22022,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "EPS fault - Motor"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22023,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "EPS fault - NVM"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22020,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {
      "Torque": "0"
    },
    "name": "EPS fault - Torque Sensor"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22019,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {
      "ECU Temperature": "0",
      "Motor Temperature": "0"
    },
    "name": "EPS Thermal Protection"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22035,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "IGNITION signal fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22034,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Angle sensor index status": "0"
    },
    "name": "No Angle calibration"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22018,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {
      "Tuning Number": "0",
      "Tuning version": "0"
    },
    "name": "No tuning set"
  }
]

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "14FF00",
    "name": "ClearDTC",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "Copy ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "DTC status - code panne": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "DTC status - flag memorisé": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "DTC status - flag present": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "DTC status - type": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "FourthDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 12
      },
      "Fth DTC status - flag memorisé": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Fth DTC status - flag present": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "SecondDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Snd DTC status - flag memorisé": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Snd DTC status - flag present": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "ThirdDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "Trd DTC status - flag memorisé": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Trd DTC status - flag present": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 2
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "21B0",
    "name": "RDBLI - Date of After Sales",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Année": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Jour": {

        "ref": true
      },
      "Mois": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true

  },

    "name": "RDBLI - Date of production",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 3,

        "firstbyte": 36,

        "firstbyte": 35,

    "minbytes": 21,
    "sentbytes": "2101",

    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },

      },

      },

      },

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 21,

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Motor Temperature": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 21,

      },
